summary: Tested coffre-fort CV files feature and MBTI removal from D'CLIC Boost Section. Backend APIs working correctly. Frontend coffre-fort picker visible and functional in Trajectoire tab. MBTI dimension removed from code (verified in ParticulierView.jsx lines 60-64).
critical_code_review_comments: MBTI dimension correctly removed from dimensions array in ParticulierView.jsx (lines 60-64)
Coffre-fort CV picker button correctly implemented with data-testid='cv-compact-coffre-picker-btn' (upload state) and 'cv-compact-coffre-reload-btn' (result state)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bob30 and testboost users have CV analysis results but no D'CLIC data, so they see the D'CLIC Boost Invite instead of the D'CLIC Boost Section. The MBTI removal was verified via code review (ParticulierView.jsx lines 60-64). The coffre-fort picker is working correctly - clicking 'Depuis mon coffre-fort' button shows dropdown with CV files from coffre-fort.

backend: GET /api/coffre/cv-files - returns list of CV files from coffre-fort (PASSED)
POST /api/cv/analyze-from-coffre - starts CV analysis from coffre-fort document (PASSED)
frontend: 'Depuis mon coffre-fort' button visible in Trajectoire tab (PASSED)
Coffre-fort picker dropdown shows CV files when button clicked (PASSED)
MBTI dimension removed from D'CLIC Boost Section dimensions array (VERIFIED via code review)

notes: The D'CLIC Boost Section with dimension cards could not be visually tested because both test users (bob30, testboost) don't have D'CLIC data. However, the MBTI removal was verified by code review - the dimensions array in ParticulierView.jsx (lines 60-64) now only contains DISC, RIASEC, and Vertu dominante.
